data.title: Run capture-baseline.sh and commit tests/fixtures/ticket-cli-baseline.json
data.description:
## Task

Run `tests/scripts/capture-baseline.sh` on the CURRENT (pre-refactor) codebase on Linux reference hardware and commit the resulting `tests/fixtures/ticket-cli-baseline.json` fixture.

### Steps

1. Ensure hyperfine is installed: `command -v hyperfine` — if not, install via: `curl -LO https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.18.0/hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb && sudo dpkg -i hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb`
2. Run: `bash tests/scripts/capture-baseline.sh`
3. Verify output at `tests/fixtures/ticket-cli-baseline.json` — all 9 ops present with mean/p50/p95/stddev
4. Commit the fixture with message: 'chore: capture pre-refactor ticket-CLI latency baseline'
   NOTE: This fixture MUST be captured before any bash-native changes land; it is the irrecoverable reference for SC6 (>10% regression gate) and SC7 (≥60% aggregate reduction).

### Testing Mode

GREEN — capturing and committing a fixture file.

## File Impact

- tests/fixtures/ticket-cli-baseline.json (CREATE — committed after running capture script)

## Acceptance

- tests/fixtures/ticket-cli-baseline.json committed with valid JSON
- All 9 ops present in fixture
- codebase_ref field matches HEAD commit at time of capture
